name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) : 
  ∀ (s : Finset ℕ), s.card = n → (s.powerset).card = 2^n := by
  intro s hs
  rw [Finset.card_powerset, hs]

name: pow_two_ge_one
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_two_ge_one (n : ℕ) : 2^n ≥ 1 := by
  apply Nat.one_le_pow
  norm_num

name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : !!b = b := by
  cases b with
  | true => rfl
  | false => rfl

name: infinite_primes
code:
import Mathlib

theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : ∃ p : ℕ, p > n ∧ Nat.Prime p := by
  have := Nat.exists_infinite_primes (n + 1)
  exact this

name: injective_card_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (h_inj : Function.Injective f) : n ≤ m := by
  have h : Fintype.card (Fin n) ≤ Fintype.card (Fin m) := Fintype.card_le_of_injective f h_inj
  simpa [Fintype.card_fin] using h

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) (s : Finset ℕ) (hs : s.card = n) : s.powerset.card = 2^n := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset]
  rw [hs]

name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append (A B : List α) : (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  rw [List.length_append]

name: double_complement
code:
import Mathlib

theorem double_complement (α : Type*) (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  exact compl_compl S

name: mono_comp_strict
code:
import Mathlib

theorem mono_comp_strict (α : Type*) [Preorder α] (f g : α → α) (hf : StrictMono f) (hg : StrictMono g) : StrictMono (f ∘ g) :=
  by exact StrictMono.comp hf hg

name: pow_add
code:
import Mathlib

theorem my_pow_add (a b : ℕ) : 2^(a + b) = 2^a * 2^b := by
  exact Nat.pow_add 2 a b

name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone (a b : ℕ) (h : a ≤ b) : 2^a ≤ 2^b := by
  apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right
  · decide
  · exact h

name: empty_subset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem empty_subset (α : Type*) (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s := by
  apply Set.empty_subset

name: finset_union_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem finset_union_comm (A B : Finset ℕ) : A ∪ B = B ∪ A := by
  rw [Finset.union_comm]

name: de_morgan_not_and
code:
import Mathlib

theorem de_morgan_not_and (P Q : Prop) : ¬(P ∧ Q) ↔ (¬P ∨ ¬Q) :=
  not_and_or

name: even_or_odd
code:
import Mathlib

theorem even_or_odd (n : ℕ) : Even n ∨ Odd n := by
  exact Nat.even_or_odd n

name: nat_pow_pos

import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 2^n > 0 := by
  apply pow_pos
  norm_num

theorem disjoint_compl (s : Set α) : Disjoint s sᶜ := by

name: empty_subset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem empty_subset (α : Type*) (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s :=
  Set.empty_subset s

name: infinite_primes
code:
import Mathlib

theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : n = 0 → ∃ p, p > n ∧ Nat.Prime p := by
  intro h
  have : n = 0 := h
  have : n < n + 1 := by omega
  exact Nat.exists_infinite_primes (n + 1)

name: card_image_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_image_le {α β : Type*} [DecidableEq α] [DecidableEq β] (s : Finset α) (f : α → β) :
  (s.image f).card ≤ s.card :=
  by apply Finset.card_image_le
